config.script:
dim oPUEdit, oPUCopyEdit
'fire_choice_list #include "50200"
'GetMenu #include "50506"
'--------------------- 'generuj potwierdzenie '--------------------- class cGenConf
'------------ 'tytul strony '------------ public sub pageTitle(byval strTitle) dim pTitle : set pTitle = page_.ctrl(ID_TITLE) pTitle.text = "" pTitle.fontsize = 5 page_.topelement.title = strTitle end sub
'---------------------- 'nagłówek potwierdzenia '---------------------- public sub pageHeader(byval strText) cleanPage dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_HEADER)) dim strNrZlec : strNrZlec = "" tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_INFO dim idZlec : idZlec = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(0).m_idZlecProd if idZlec > clng(0) then strNrZlec = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD, idZlec).strNrDok end if tab.newcell.addtext(strText).element.bold = true tab.addctrl(CTRL_TYPE_STATIC,-1).element.text = strNrZlec tab.cell.colspan = 3 end sub
'------------------ 'tabela z surowcami '------------------ public sub tableSurow(byref oRepDict, byval pDraw) dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_SUROWIEC)) 'nagłowek tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "LP", 600, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Surowiec", 6000, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Ilość", 2000, "", 1, 1, false
dim nLP : nLP = 1 dim iter, oPUI for iter = 0 to oPUCopyEdit.count() set oPUI = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(iter) if oRepDict.exists(iter) and oPUI.m_eTyp = N5PROPT_SUROWIEC then 'rekord tab.newrow dim crColor if nLP mod 2 = 0 then tab.row.backcolor = ROW_COLOR crColor = ROW_COLOR else crColor = WHITE_COLOR end if
oPUI.m_curIloscWykon = oPUI.m_curIloscDoWyk - oPUI.m_curIloscWykon pDraw.drawCell tab, cstr(nLP), "Verdana", ALIGN_RIGHT, 0, 0, "" dim strNazwaProd : strNazwaProd = "" if oPUI.m_idProdukt > clng(0) then strNazwaProd = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPUI.m_idProdukt).strNazwa end if pDraw.drawCell tab, cstr(strNazwaProd), "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" pDraw.drawCellCur tab, CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP, oPUI.m_curIloscWykon, "Verdana", 4, 12, "", crColor tab.element.border = 1 'właściwość dla wiersza (indeks w tablicy) set tab.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() tab.row.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) = iter nLP = nLP + 1 end if next end sub
'------------------------ 'tabela do edycji PROP'ow '------------------------ public sub tableEdit(byref oRepDict, byval pDraw) dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_EDIT)) 'nagłowek tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "LP", 600, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Data rozp", 2000, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Data zakon", 2000, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Typ zasobu", 3000, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Zasób", 3000, "", 1, 1, false tab.cell.colspan = 2 pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Produkt", 3500, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Typ", 700, "", 1, 1, false pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Status", 1500, "", 1, 1, false tab.cell.colspan = 2 pDraw.drawCellHead tab, 1, "Ilość wykon", 1000, "", 1, 1, false
dim nLP : nLP = 1 dim iter, oPUI for iter = 0 to oPUCopyEdit.count() set oPUI = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(iter) if oRepDict.exists(iter) then tab.newrow dim crColor if nLP mod 2 = 0 then tab.row.backcolor = ROW_COLOR crColor = ROW_COLOR else crColor = WHITE_COLOR end if
pDraw.drawCell tab, cstr(nLP), "Verdana", ALIGN_RIGHT, 0, 0, "" pDraw.drawCellDate tab, CTRLID_DATE_ROZP, oPUI.m_dDataRozp, "Verdana", crColor tab.element.border = 1 pDraw.drawCellDate tab, CTRLID_DATE_ZAK, oPUI.m_dDataZak, "Verdana", crColor tab.element.border = 1 'typ zasobu dim oTypZasobu : set oTypZasobu = nothing if oPUI.m_idTypZasobu > clng(0) then set oTypZasobu = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5TYPZASOBPROD,oPUI.m_idTypZasobu) end if if not oTypZasobu is nothing then pDraw.drawCell tab, oTypZasobu.tzp_strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else pDraw.drawCell tab, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if 'zasób pDraw.drawCellEdit tab, CTRLID_ZASOB_PROD, 12, 0, "Verdana", crColor 'wybór zasobu tab.newcell with tab.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) .image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) .width=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .height=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .tip = "Wybór z listy" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "stdChoiceZasobProd" .hli.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) = iter end with 'produkt dim oProdukt : set oProdukt = nothing if oPUI.m_idProdukt > clng(0) then set oProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPUI.m_idProdukt) end if if not oProdukt is nothing then pDraw.drawCell tab, oProdukt.strNazwa, "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" pDraw.drawCell tab, strTyp(oProdukt.prod_cWyrob,oProdukt.prod_cSurowiec), "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" else pDraw.drawCell tab, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" pDraw.drawCell tab, "", "Verdana", ALIGN_LEFT, 0, 0, "" end if 'status pDraw.drawCellEdit tab, CTRLID_STATUS_OPER, 6, 0, "Verdana", crColor 'zmiana statusu tab.newcell with tab.cell.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_PICTURE, -1) .image = clng(PICTURE_CHOICE_N5PRODUKT) .width=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .height=Clng(HEIGHT_FOR_12PX) .tip = "Wybór z listy" set .hli= doc_.createhli() .hli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "stdChoiceStatus" .hli.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) = iter .hli.prop(PROP_CHANGE_STATUS) = clng(.ident) end with 'ilość wykonana pDraw.drawCellCur tab, CTRLID_ILOSC_WYKON, oPUI.m_curIloscWykon, "Verdana", 4, 10, "", crColor
'właściwość dla wiersza (indeks w tablicy) set tab.row.userprop = doc_.createhli() tab.row.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) = iter nLP = nLP + 1 end if next end sub
'--------------------------------------- 'dodaje odpowiednie przyciski na stronie '--------------------------------------- public sub pageButtons dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_BUTTONS)) tab.newrow.newcell pageAddButton tab, "OK", vbOK pageAddButton tab, "Anuluj", vbCancel end sub
'------------------- 'pojedynczy przycisk '------------------- public sub pageAddButton(byref tab, byval strName, byval nOption) dim pNewHli set pNewHli = doc_.createhli() pNewHli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "pageClick" pNewHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) = CLng(nOption)
tab.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 tab.cell.keepline = true tab.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT set tab.element.hli = pNewHli with tab.element .text = strName .size = 12 .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with end sub
'------------------ 'czyści całą stronę '------------------ public sub cleanPage doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_HEADER)).removeall doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_SUROWIEC)).removeall doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_BUTTONS)).removeall end sub
'------------------------------------------ 'rysowanie potwierdzenia (wydanie surowców) '------------------------------------------ public sub drawConfPageRawMat(byref g_oRepDict, byval pDraw) pageTitle "Wydanie materiału" pageHeader "Wydanie surowców dla zlecenia: " tableSurow g_oRepDict, pDraw pageButtons end sub
'---------------------------------------- 'rysowanie potwierdzenia do edycji PROP'ow '---------------------------------------- public sub drawConfPageEdit(byref g_oRepDict, byval pDraw) pageTitle "Edycja operacji produkcyjnej" pageHeader "Edycja operacji dla zlecenia: " tableEdit g_oRepDict, pDraw pageButtons end sub
end class
'--------------------- 'otwórz/zamknij stronę '--------------------- function fopen() fopen = true end function
function fback() page_.result = vbCancel cleanVar page_.goback() fback = true end function
'---------------------- 'naciśnięcie na klawisz '---------------------- sub pageClick(byref pHli) page_.result=pHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) cleanVar page_.goback end sub
'------------------------------- 'potwierdzenie wydania materiału '------------------------------- function drawPageRawMat(byref oPUCopy, byref g_oRepDict, byval pDraw) set oPUCopyEdit = oPUCopy dim pGRM : set pGRM = new cGenConf pGRM.drawConfPageRawMat g_oRepDict, pDraw drawPageRawMat = page_.domodalauto() end function
'-------------------- 'edycja pola w propie '-------------------- function drawPageEdit(byref oPU, byref oPUCopy, byref g_oRepDict, byval pDraw) 'przekazanie oPU do kolorowania wprowadzonych zmian set oPUEdit = oPU set oPUCopyEdit = oPUCopy dim pGRM : set pGRM = new cGenConf pGRM.drawConfPageEdit g_oRepDict, pDraw drawPageEdit = page_.domodalauto() end function
'-------------------------- 'wybór zasobu produkcyjnego '-------------------------- function stdChoiceZasobProd(pHLI) dim idZasob, strWhere dim nIndex : nIndex= pHLI.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) if oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idTypZasobu > clng(0) then strWhere = "zsp_pTypZasobu = " + cstr(oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idTypZasobu) else strWhere = "" end if idZasob = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5ZASOBPROD,"Wybór zasobu produkcyjnego","",strWhere,"","") if idZasob > 0 then oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idZasob = idZasob end if end function
'---------------------------------------------------------- 'zwraca typ produktu W-wyrób, S-surowiec, WS-wyrób/surowiec '---------------------------------------------------------- function strTyp(byval cWyrob, byval cSurowiec) : strTyp = "" if cWyrob = "1" and cSurowiec = "1" then strTyp = "WS" else if cWyrob = "1" then strTyp = "W" elseif cSurowiec = "1" then strTyp = "S" else strTyp = "" end if end if end function
'----------------------------------- 'zwraca status operacji produkcyjnej '----------------------------------- function strStatus(byval eStatus) select case eStatus case 1 strStatus = "Sym" case 2 strStatus = "Zlec" case 3 strStatus = "Do wyk" case 4 strStatus = "W real" case 5 strStatus = "Zreal" case else strStatus = "Inny" end select end function
'---------------------- 'wybór statusu operacji '---------------------- function stdChoiceStatus(pHLI) dim idZasob dim nIndex : nIndex= pHLI.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) dim pCtrl : set pCtrl = page_.ctrl(pHLI.prop(PROP_CHANGE_STATUS)) dim pMenu : set pMenu = mm_new_menu("Wybór z listy", pHLI.prop(PROP_CHANGE_STATUS)) with pMenu .add_item "Symulacja", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""1"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " .add_item "Zlecone", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""2"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " .add_item "Do wykonania", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""3"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " .add_item "W realizacji", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""4"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " .add_item "Zrealizowane", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""5"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " .add_item "Inny", "varFunctionHLI=""changeStatus"" vs100=""6"" vs101=""" + cstr(nIndex) + """ " end with mm_show_hide page_, pMenu end function
'-------------- 'zmiana statusu '-------------- function changeStatus(pHLI) dim eStatus : eStatus = pHLI.prop(100) dim nIndex : nIndex= pHLI.prop(101) oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_eStatus = clng(eStatus) end function
'-------------------------------------------- 'ustawia kolor dla wiersza w zależności od LP '-------------------------------------------- function setRowStyle(nLP) if nLP mod 2 = 0 then setRowStyle = ROW_COLOR else setRowStyle = WHITE_COLOR end if end function
'------------------- 'kolorowanie wiersza '------------------- function changeRowColor(byref oRow, byval bValue) if bValue then 'wiersz na żółto oRow.backcolor = YELLOW_COLOR else 'usuń żółty kolor if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then dim nLP : nLP = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) + 1 oRow.backcolor = setRowStyle(nLP) end if end if changeRowColor = oRow.backcolor end function
'----------------------------------- 'zwraca true jeśli modyfikowano PROP '----------------------------------- function compare_PUI(byval nIndex) : compare_PUI = false dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPUEdit.get_item(nIndex) dim oPUIBuf : set oPUIBuf = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex) if (not oPUEdit.compare_item(oPUI,oPUIBuf)) or (oPUIBuf.m_curIloscWykon > ccur(0)) then compare_PUI = true else compare_PUI = false end if end function
'-------------------------- 'kontrolki dla pól currency '-------------------------- function c##CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex) if oPUI.m_curIloscWykon > ccur(0) then oCtrl.value = ccur(oPUI.m_curIloscWykon) else oCtrl.value = ccur(0) end if end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) : c##CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP##_ondataentered = false dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex) oPUI.m_curIloscWykon = ccur(newValue) end if end if c##CTRLID_ILOSC_PROP##_ondataentered = true end function
'----------------------------------- 'czyści zmienne po zamknięciu strony '----------------------------------- sub cleanVar set oPUEdit = nothing set oPUCopyEdit = nothing end sub
'----------------------------- 'kontrolki dla daty realizacji '----------------------------- function c##CTRLID_DATE_ROZP##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_DATE_ROZP##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oCtrl.value = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_dDataRozp oCtrl.backcolor = changeRowColor(oRow, compare_PUI(nIndex)) exit function end if end if oCtrl.value = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() end function
function c##CTRLID_DATE_ROZP##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, newValue) : c##CTRLID_DATE_ROZP##_ondataentered = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_dDataRozp = cdate(newValue) end if end if end function
'------------------------------ 'kontrolki dla daty zakończenia '------------------------------ function c##CTRLID_DATE_ZAK##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_DATE_ZAK##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oCtrl.value = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_dDataZak oCtrl.backcolor = changeRowColor(oRow, compare_PUI(nIndex)) exit function end if end if oCtrl.value = trans_.afc.globals.nulldate() end function
function c##CTRLID_DATE_ZAK##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, newValue) : c##CTRLID_DATE_ZAK##_ondataentered = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_dDataZak = cdate(newValue) end if end if end function
'---------------------------------- 'kontrolki dla zasobu produkcyjnego '---------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_ZASOB_PROD##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_ZASOB_PROD##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) if oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idZasob > clng(0) then oCtrl.value = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZASOBPROD,clng(oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idZasob)).zsp_strNazwa else oCtrl.value = "" end if oCtrl.backcolor = changeRowColor(oRow, compare_PUI(nIndex)) end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_ZASOB_PROD##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, newValue) : c##CTRLID_ZASOB_PROD##_ondataentered = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_idZasob = clng(0) end if end if end function
'------------------------------------- 'kontrolka dla wyboru statusu operacji '------------------------------------- function c##CTRLID_STATUS_OPER##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_STATUS_OPER##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oCtrl.value = strStatus(oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_eStatus) oCtrl.backcolor = changeRowColor(oRow, compare_PUI(nIndex)) end if end if oCtrl.disable = true end function
'------------------------------ 'kontrolki dla ilości wykonanej '------------------------------ function c##CTRLID_ILOSC_WYKON##_ongetdata(byref oCtrl) : c##CTRLID_ILOSC_WYKON##_ongetdata = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) dim oPUI : set oPUI = oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex) oCtrl.value = ccur(oPUI.m_curIloscWykon) oCtrl.backcolor = changeRowColor(oRow, compare_PUI(nIndex)) end if end if end function
function c##CTRLID_ILOSC_WYKON##_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, newValue) : c##CTRLID_ILOSC_WYKON##_ondataentered = true dim nIndex dim oRow : set oRow = oCtrl.parent.parent if not oRow.userprop is nothing then if oRow.userprop.exists(PROP_TAB_INX) then nIndex = oRow.userprop.prop(PROP_TAB_INX) oPUCopyEdit.get_item(nIndex).m_curIloscWykon = ccur(newValue) end if end if end function
